# Atul Thorat — UX Designer Portfolio

> Portfolio of Atul Thorat, a Product/UX Designer specialising in logistics SaaS and mobile app experiences. Showcases the Youhonk product suite (delivery, customer, vendor apps) along with skills, background, and contact information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, case studies, skills, about, and contact for Atul Thorat.
- [Youhonk Delivery App Case Study](/case-study/delivery): Designing a real-time delivery partner app for vehicle pickup and drop.
- [Youhonk Customer App Case Study](/case-study/customer): Customer-facing app for booking vehicle repair services.
- [Youhonk Vendor App Case Study](/case-study/vendor): Vendor portal for managing bookings and workshop operations.
